---
title: "compare_models"
generated: true
description: "Per-element nested-model comparison (ModelArray `full vs. reduced`)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.glm`](../nitrix-stats-glm.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:compare_models -->
```python
compare_models(full: GLMResult, reduced: GLMResult, *, test: CompareTest = 'auto') -> Tuple[Float[Array, 'V'], Float[Array, 'V']]
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:compare_models -->
Per-element nested-model comparison (ModelArray `full vs. reduced`).

`reduced` must be nested in `full` (fewer parameters, same data).
Returns `(statistic, p_value)`:

- `test='F'` (or `'auto'` for a Gaussian family) -- the extra-sum-of-
  squares F-test, `F = ((D_r - D_f) / (k_f - k_r)) / (D_f / dof_f)` on
  `(k_f - k_r, dof_f)` degrees of freedom.
- `test='LRT'` (or `'auto'` otherwise) -- the likelihood-ratio test,
  $2 (ll_f - ll_r) ~ \chi^2(k_f - k_r)$.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:compare_models -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `full` | `GLMResult` | — | — | — |
| `reduced` | `GLMResult` | — | — | — |
| `test` | `CompareTest` | — | `'auto'` | — |

**Returns** `Tuple[Float[Array, 'V'], Float[Array, 'V']]`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
